strings.attack_k1:
[icon=keyF] to attack.
Pickup instantly finishes reload
strings.attack_k2:
[icon=keyL] to attack.
Pickup instantly finishes reload
strings.attack_g:
[icon=rightBumper] to attack.
Pickup instantly finishes reload
strings.nerfDescription: [i]Nerfs are added to the opponents deck.
strings.endDemo:
[outlineBack=#ffffff][lineThickness=2]I HOPE YOU ENJOYED THE DEMO! :)
Feedback and a positive rating is greatly appreciated!

autoAim.name: Aim Bot
autoAim.description: Roughly shoot into the opponents direction.

shield.name: Rotating Shield
shield.description: A rotating shield that deflects bullets.

bouncingBullet.name: Bouncing Bullet
bouncingBullet.description: Bullets bounces when they hit solids.

splitShot.name: Split Shot
splitShot.description: Shoot one more bullet with a random split.

homing.name: Home, Sweet Home
homing.description: The bullet slightly homes towards your opponent.

salve.name: Burst Fire
salve.description: Fire two additional bullets in quick succession, but reloading takes longer.

autoShoot.name: Stuck Trigger
autoShoot.description: Your opponent is forced to shoot once reloaded.

randomizer.name: Randomizer
randomizer.description: Your shots get a random buff applied.

hugeBullets.name: Max Caliber
hugeBullets.description: Huge bullets, easier to hit the target and walls.

rocketJump.name: Rocket Jump
rocketJump.description: You additionally shoot downwards, knockback launches you upwards.

badAim.name: Bad Aim
badAim.description: Your opponents shots are very inaccurate.

autoJump.name: Pogo Stick
autoJump.description: Your opponent is periodically forced to jump.

moon.name: Moon Gravity
moon.description: Your opponent jumps higher and falls slower.

ninjitsu.name: Ninjitsu
ninjitsu.description: Shooting teleports you to the position of your last reload.

spikySkin.name: Spiky Skin
spikySkin.description: Destroy the opponent if they touch your body, but you are slightly slower.

defensiveShot.name: Defensive Shooting
defensiveShot.description: Your bullets destroy the opponents bullets.

lingeringBullets.name: Lingering Bullets
lingeringBullets.description: Your bullets stay at the end of their path for some time.

drone.name: Drone
drone.description: A [b]drone[/b] that follows you and sometimes shoots.

turret.name: Turret
turret.description: Create a [b]turret[/b] at your spawn position.

zeus.name: Zeus' Wrath
zeus.description:
Your opponent is targeted by [b]lightning strike[/b] at random intervals. 
 
 ATTENTION: can hit both players.

zigZag.name: Zig Zag Bullet
zigZag.description: Your bullets fly in a zig-zag path, making them harder to dodge.

jumpSustain.name: Ultra Jump Sustain
jumpSustain.description: Keep holding jump to sustain your jump for even longer.

heavyBullets.name: Heavy Bullets
heavyBullets.description: Your opponents bullets are slower and get pulled down by gravity.

selfDamage.name: Self Damage
selfDamage.description: Your opponents bullets will hurt themselves.

slipperyFloor.name: Slippery Floor
slipperyFloor.description: Your opponent slides on the floor.

faulty.name: Faulty Ammo
faulty.description: Your oppenents shots sometimes don't fire correctly, bullet still travels a small distance.

concentratedReload.name: Concentrated Reload
concentratedReload.description: Reload much faster if you are standing still.

steve.name: Steve
steve.description: Pressing shoot during the reload places a [b]destructible block[/b]. You can temporarily trap your opponent inside the block.

comeback.name: Comeback
comeback.description: You get various buffs if your opponent is leading, the buffs are [b]stronger the higher the point lead[/b].

disableReloadPickup.name: they are mine
disableReloadPickup.description: Your opponnent cannot collect reload pick-ups anymore.

fasterPicker.name: Fast Picker
fasterPicker.description: Pick-ups refresh much faster if you pick them up.

damocles.name: Damocles Sword
damocles.description: Get a [b]sword[/b] that continously [b]flies towards the opponent[/b].

barrier.name: Barrier
barrier.description: Get a temporary [b]Barrier[/b] at the start of each round.
